titleStmt.title: SII 15.2: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 2. (B.K. No. 207 of 1926-27.) NIḌGUNDI, RON TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone set up in front of the Nārāyaṇadēva temple.
This is dated Śaka 996, Ānanda, Āśvija puṇṇami, Tuesday, lunar eclipse, corresponding to 1074 A.D., October 7.

It records a gift of the village Kaḷḷamanapaḷḷi to the god Tripurusha by Kannaḍasandhivigrahādhipati, Mahāprachaṇḍa-daṇḍanāyaka Jannamayya, with the approval of the king. The donor is said to have had a temple constructed in honour of the deity at Niḍuguṇḍi in Kisukāḍu Seventy. The earlier portion contains a genealogical account of the Chāḷukyas. The epigraph is mutilated and worn out.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīramaṇīmanōramaṇa vāgramaṇīramaṇādrirājaputrīramaṇīmanōramaṇa rūpade satvarajastamōguṇādhārateyiṁ jagasthiti samudbhava saṁhṛti hētuvāda
nīrēruhanābha nīrajasamudbhava śaṁkararīgabhīṣṭamaṁ . kanda . Avaroḷage sakaḷa bhuvanō dbhavakāraṇanenisi nagaḷdanādi brahmaṁ divijamunijananutapadaviṣṭaraṁ taru
ṇataraṇikiraṇaccāya . Aṁbhōjāsanana manassaṁbhavanādaṁ samastamunijananutapādāṁ bhōjananupamaṁ svāyaṁbhuvamanu
nnapesare nijagōtrakkāytu negarttevetta pesarane vanadhiv® ge negaḻdanā mā navya . Ātana tanūja Npa hārīti nātaṁge
daṁ paṁcaśikhaṁ . Avana tanayaṁ caḷukyaṁ bhuvanastutakīrtti negaḻdanavaninde cāḷukya
nadaṭina bāhubalada kalitanada cāgada
śikhaṁ caḷukya
worn out
di sārvvabhaumanṛpa

worn out
manujar . kuḷatiḷaka�ḷātiḷaka triḷōkataḷa tiḷakananisi
riyarudi Udadhivṛtōrvviyūḷ patige bhuvanamillade bhakti
nāḷda yoḷ nuḍigeḍeyāgi mūṟu śaraṇa
peṁpina tiṇpina jannigaṁge
peṁpina nuṇpina tiṇpinēḷgeyiṁ . bittara
worn out
ge kūrppena niṁna nīgaḷ janaka
negartte sonṛtōktiya nuḍi su
villene jīyenisidanavanītaḷadajanadiṁ janna .
ya pārāvārapārijāta kammābhidāna kuḷakamaḷinīvanakaḷahaṁsanuṁ kaśyapaṁ kumudinīkumudabāndhava
karaṇaparaṇatabrāta . Āsthānadānavārivāhini vi hitamahī
kāḍanārkkatiḷakamippantirddaṁ niḍuguṇḍiyoḷu . Ā pārjjitā tmīya puṇya
phaḷapradāyaka . cāḷukyacakrēśvara madhukaraṁ rājahaṁsaṁ sarasvatī svāmivaṁcaka gajapaṁcānanaṁ
malladēvapādāraviṁdamadhukaraṁ satyaratnākara śrīmajjannamayyaṁ nayanābhirāma naṁba tanna 996 neya Ānanda saṁvatsarada Āśvija puṇnami maṁgaḷavāradaṁdina sōma
rbbettisuvalliya dakṣiṇākāladoḷ . kannaḍasandhivigrahādhipati mahāpracaṇḍadaṇḍa nāyaka jannamayyaṁgaḷu niḍugu tripuruṣa khaṁḍasphuṭita navakarmmakkavalliya
ḷa parivārakkavalliyōduva māṇigaḷgaṁ vakkhāṇisuvupādhyāyarggaṁ banavā siya baḷiya baṁkāpurada nelevīḍinoḷ baḷiya kaḷḷamana paḷḷiyaṁ tribhōgābhyantarasiddhiyiṁ sarvvanamaśyavāgi śrīmadbhuvanaikamalla paḍedu nayanā
bhirāmaśālege re . © . vṛtta . janamellaṁ nere tandu sādhi simenuttu puṇyama varadaivaṁ nīyeṁbara śailēṁdramanā trimūrttiverasu tanda mmāḍisi jannanī tripuruṣa nivāsaṁ karaṁ raṁjikuṁ . taḷamu
ṭṭe vaḷayaṁ diśā taṭagaḷē kaggaḷ kuḷaparbbataṁgaḷe mahā kūṭaṁgaḷe vunnatiyane tāḷditō mahītaḷe doḷ . jannama māḍisida tripuruṣāvāsaṁ kaḷāsāsva . kanda . Ārppogaḷaḷavarō kisukāḍeppattaṟabaḷiya kaḷḷamanapaḷḷiyanittā
rppiṁ jannaṁ māḍisi nōrppaḍe niḍuguṇḍiyoḷ tripuruṣālayamaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 15.2 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
